subparts.text: The output voltage of Op-amp is changes by 20V in 4µsec. What is the slew rate of Op-amp?
Explain the virtual ground concept with a suitable example.
What is precision diode? What part it plays in a half wave rectifier?
Explain the basic principle of a RC Phase shift oscillator.
Give limitations of an Operational Transconductance Amplifier .
Discuss the power conversion efficiency of a Class A Amplifier.
For which applications active filters are preferred over passive filters and why?
What is a phase detector? What are its types?

questions.question_text: Explain the meaning of open loop and closed loop operation of an op-amp. Discuss different circuits and their working for both types of operation of Op- Amp.
Discuss about the various methods used for improving CMRR of the Op-Amp.
Draw the circuit of a Monostable Multivibrator using Op-Amp. Explain its operation and find out the mathematical expression for pulse width ‘T’ for the monostable multivibrator.
Design an op-amp differentiator that will differentiate an input signal with fmax = 500 Hz. Draw the output waveform for a sine wave of 2V peak at 200 Hz applied to the differentiator.
Find the transfer function of the circuit given in Figure below:
Explain the operation of Class A Push-Pull Amplifier. Give circuit diagram and detailed working.
Design a fifth order Butterworth low-pass filter having upper cut-off frequency 2kHz.
Write short notes on the following:- Monostable operation of 555 Timer Block schematic of Phase Locked Loop
